policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-aps-12 - Deny local authentication methods for FTP and SCM deployments to App Service'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+App+Service#IncidentremediationAppService#drcp-aps-12 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP App Service Site SCM Deny local authentication methods
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents the creation of an app service (such as an Web App, Function App or Logic App v2) that uses local authentication methods. Disabling local authentication methods improves security by ensuring that App Service exclusively require Azure Active Directory identities for authentication.

drcp.name: AppServiceSiteSCMLocalAuthenticationMethods
drcp.controlDesc: Deny local authentication methods for FTP and SCM deployments to App Service

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
